/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.0.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/picotool.dir/data_locs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/picotool.dir/no_otp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/picotool.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/picotool.dir/lib/whereami/whereami.c.o CMakeFiles/picotool.dir/lib/whereami/whereami++.cpp.o -o picotool  bintool/libbintool.a elf2uf2/libelf2uf2.a errors/liberrors.a elf/libelf.a errors/liberrors.a
